channel.title: Satyam — Journal
channel.description: Portfolio and digital journal of a Python developer exploring AI, backend systems, mountains, and the craft of making things that last.

item.title: Designing Calm APIs
item.description: APIs should feel like a good hotel lobby — quiet, predictable, and never surprising for the wrong reasons.

item.title: What Mountains Taught Me About Models
item.description: Altitude changes how you plan. So does production ML. Both punish optimism without preparation.

item.title: Scraping with Respect
item.description: Automation can be polite. Here's how I think about rate limits, robots.txt, and long-term access.
